impact: This prevents the worker from repeatedly retrying the same broad source_freshness implementation that failed py_compile, preserves completed work, removes stale duplicate generated status text, and gives the supervisor a deterministic order for autonomous progress: finish independent active work first, then use one-file syntax-first recovery before classifier or renderer work.
summary: Repair PP&D supervisor task selection guidance so blocked source-freshness work stays parked while the daemon continues the active missing-information detector task and later resumes source freshness through syntax-first recovery steps.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 2 task(s) are blocked: Task checkbox-54: Add a source freshness fixture that classifies stale PP&D guidance, changed content hashes, removed pages, and recrawl priority without performing a live recrawl.; Task checkbox-55: Add a fixture-only change report renderer for public PP&D source freshness results that summarizes changed requirements, new or removed links, and affected permit-process fixtures with citation references.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
